displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
Colgate Triple Action Original Mint Toothpaste protects against cavities, whitens teeth, and freshens breath. Use this refreshing toothpaste for proven cavity protection for your whole family. Three stripes for three way protection:
• Fluoride strengthens teeth against tooth decay
• Gentle cleaning crystals help remove surface stains
• Freshens up your whole mouth

metaData.Key Information:
The New Colgate Total Fresh Mint toothpaste, for Active Prevention, helps to fight the root cause of 8 oral health problems - Gum Problems, Plaque, Tartar, Sensitivity, Enamel Erosion, Stains, Bad Breath, Cavities. Its Powerful, Patented, Preventative Technology is clinically proven to provide 24 hours antibacterial action*, that provides long lasting preventative benefits against bacteria to help prevent oral care problems before they start. this formula contains a unique system that stabilizes our active ingredient and is designed for superior*** performance to help prevent many common oral care issues.

Use Colgate Total toothpaste twice daily to actively prevent against oral care problems before they start.

* 2x daily brushing with 4 weeks continued use
*** vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste

product.description:
Sensodyne is both the World's #1 Sensitive Toothpaste Brand* and the #1 Dentist Recommended Brand in Singapore**.

Trusted by millions of people, Sensodyne's range of toothpastes is clinically proven to relieve sensitive teeth and provide long lasting protection with twice daily brushing.

Our specialized toothpaste caters to each sensitive need to help humanity reclaim life’s small pleasures – to enjoy food and drinks without missing out on everyday life.

*Based on retail value sales data 12 months, ending August 2021
**Based on survey results conducted in Singapore between 3rd July to 20th September 2023."

Imported and Marketed by:
GSK Consumer Healthcare Singapore Pte. Ltd.
23 Rochester Park, Singapore 139234

metaData.Ingredients:
Glycerin, PEG-8, Hydrated Silica, Pentasodium Triphosphate, Aroma, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate,
Titanium Dioxide, Carbomer, Stannous Fluoride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Saccharin, Siliica, Sodium Fluoride.
Contains Stannous Fluoride 0.454% w/w & Sodium Fluoride 0.0721% w/w (1450ppm
Fluoride).
metaData.Key Information:
The NEW Sensodyne Sensitivity Gum & Enamel Toothpaste has a Triple Action Formula


- It is clinically proven to relieve sensitive teeth, improve gum health, whilst also rehardening the enamel^.

- Builds a protective layer over the sensitive areas of teeth.

- Micro foam formula targets and removes plaque bacteria, penetrating even the hard-to-reach areas in between teeth and along the gumline, to help restore gum health.

- Rehardens the enamel surface and protects teeth from acids, whilst being gentle on enamel

- Mint flavoured for an extra fresh feeling.


Sensodyne Sensitivity Gum & Enamel Toothpaste is a fluoride toothpaste that can be used every day and provides daily care for sensitive teeth, gums, and enamel^.

^With twice daily brushing
metaData.Preparation:
Brush twice a day and not more than three times, minimize swallowing and spit out. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.

Talk to your dentist or doctor as soon as possible if you experience swelling of the mouth or face.

Do not use if carton seals are broken.

Sensitive teeth may indicate an underlying problem that needs prompt care, if symptoms persist or worsen see your dentist.

Not for use by children under 12 years of age, unless on advice of a dental professional or doctor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep out of reach of children. Store below 30°C.
